learn.title: Learn
learn.hoverHint: Hover any cell to highlight its row and column.
learn.nineText: for 9 x n, the digits of the result add up to 9 (for example, 9 x 7 = 63, and 6 + 3 = 9).
learn.fiveText: multiplying by 5 ends in 0 or 5. For even numbers, divide by 2 then add 0; for odd numbers, divide by 2 and end with 5.
learn.tenText: multiplying by 10 is just adding one zero at the end of the number.
learn.elevenText: for single digits, repeat the number (for example, 11 x 6 = 66).
